title: Welcome to Binary Coven
description: Learn the essential game functions and mechanics to survive and thrive on the farm.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Welcome to Binary Coven! I see you're already familiar with coding. Perfect! Here, we use code to control everything on the farm.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Our farm uses a Python-like language. You'll write code to control your character and farm operations.

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Let me show you the available functions. Open your terminal by clicking yourself or pressing the code button.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Great! This is your code editor. The functions you'll need are: move_up(), move_down(), move_left(), move_right(), plant(), harvest(), and eat().

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Try the basic API. Use move_right() three times to reach that farmland, then use plant() to plant wheat.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Remember: each function call costs energy. You'll need to manage that carefully!

objectives.description: Plant wheat using the plant() function

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Good! You understand the basic functions. Now let's talk about the game mechanics you'll need to master.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Moving step by step takes many function calls! Is there a faster way?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Yes! Use move_to(x, y) to go directly to any position. For example, move_to(10, 8) moves you to coordinates (10, 8) in one command!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So instead of chaining move_right() and move_down(), I can just specify the destination?

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Exactly! The grid uses (x, y) coordinates. X increases as you go right, Y increases as you go down. You can check your position with get_position().

objectives.description: Use move_to() to move to specific coordinates

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Coordinate-based movement is much more efficient for long distances.

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: This will save so much energy and time!
